CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ClickHouse - столбцовая система управления базами данных', 'система');
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(haystack, 'столбцовая') AS has_subsequence FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%система%';
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(haystack, needle) AS result FROM (SELECT '12345' AS haystack, '24' AS needle) t;
CREATE TABLE subquery_test AS (SELECT 'Test Subquery' AS haystack, 'Sub' AS needle) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8((SELECT haystack FROM subquery_test), (SELECT needle FROM subquery_test));
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack = 'Первая строка' AND needle = 'вторая';
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE needle IN ('система', 'мир');
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(haystack, nil) AS result FROM test_strings;
SELECT hasSubsequenceUTF8(haystack, '') AS result FROM test_strings;
